title: Six-gameplan portfolio mapped to the proposal milestones
body:
**Context**: docs/phasekeep-proposal.md 1.0 (section 17) sequences PhaseKeep as milestones 0, 1, 2, 3, 3.5, 4, strictly value-ordered, no calendar dates. The repo needs a structure agents can execute autonomously session by session with durable memory.
**Decision**: One driven gameplan per milestone: 2026-07-19-m0-read-contract, m1-dashboard, m2-terminal, m3-agent-sessions, m35-installers, m4-announcement. Executed strictly in that order; focus advances to the next gameplan when the previous one closes; cross-gameplan artifacts are declared with cz_consumes so cascade walks between them.
**Consequences**: Each milestone gets its own closeable scope and post-mortem; a pause after any gameplan strands nothing (proposal 15.6). Later gameplans are amended in place when earlier execution surfaces changes, rather than re-planned from scratch.
**Evidence**: docs/phasekeep-proposal.md section 17 (roadmap), section 15.6 (phase gating as bus-factor mitigation)
**Status**: active (2026-07-19)
